notes:
v2.4.2 Hotfix
🐛 Fixed PF2e Speed sometimes showing as 0 on Foundry V14 / PF2e 8.x.
🐛 Fixed PF2e character sheets failing to open after editing Speed from the HUD.
🐛 Improved PF2e alternate speed handling for fly, climb, swim, and burrow.

v2.4.1 Hotfix
🐛 Fixed config panel crash on PF2e

v2.4.0 Update
📝 Card Quick Notes — write memos on any HUD card (all users)
💥 HP Change Popup — floating damage/healing numbers
👥 Scene Friendly NPCs — auto-display on HUD
🗂️ Actor Groups — save & swap roster selections
🖱️ Quick Roster Management — right-click add/remove
🐛 Fixed item uses (Ki Points, charges) not adjustable via HUD on DnD5e 4.x+

announcement.title: ⚔️ Stylish Action HUD v2.4.2
announcement.content:
v2.4.2 Hotfix

  • Fixed PF2e Speed sometimes showing as 0 on Foundry V14 / PF2e 8.x.
  • Fixed PF2e character sheets failing to open after editing Speed from the HUD.
  • Improved PF2e alternate speed handling for fly, climb, swim, and burrow.
